title: hieracium maculatum subsp. commixtum
intro: Hieracium maculatum subsp. commixtum, also known as spotted hawkweed or spotted devil's-bit, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Hieracium maculatum subsp. commixtum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Hieracium maculatum subsp. commixtum can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves to be used topically or internally.
